name: Zucchini Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup cocoa powder or carob powder (sifted)
1 teaspoon coconut extract (it has no fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an 8 x 15-inch baking pan by spraying it and coating with flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine zucchini, sugar, applesauce, vanilla, and coconut extract.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda, and cocoa powder.
5. Mix the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Spread batter in the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes.
